calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Plaintiff Dipak Patel was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Elza Evans.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 11,2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit 12/06/08----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Rent and Daily Damages Worksheet - Undated-------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Dipak Patel, and against defendant Elza Evans as follows:

Damages/Rent - $1,716.91.
Costs - $240.00.
Total - $1,956.91.

Additionally, plaintiff Dipak Patel is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 235 Eddy Street, Room 102, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Plaintiff stipulates to the return of the Exibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintiff Dipak Patel appeared in propria persona. Defendant did not appear.
Settlement conference not held. Trial remains on calendar.

Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
